design_context: Dashboard & Admin Panel for Pharmaceutical MLM

layout.spacing_system: Generous padding: p-6, p-8 for containers, tight gap-4 for bento grids.
layout.dashboard_grid: Bento 'Control Room' Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with tight gap-4 or gap-6. Widgets stretch h-full.
layout.surfaces: Grid Borders ('Technical' Look) or Flat Cards: 1px border-border, no shadow, bg-white. Hover states with -translate-y-1 and shadow-sm.

components.buttons: Shadcn Button, override to rounded-sm. High contrast text on primary buttons.
components.inputs: Shadcn Input, rounded-sm, 1px border, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent_primary.
components.tables: Shadcn Table, dense padding, clear column headers, left-aligned except for numbers/actions.
components.network_tree: Custom node-link layout using HTML/Tailwind. Rectangular cards with 1px border, avatar, and text. Connecting lines using absolute positioning and border classes.
components.cards: Cardless or flat rectangular cards with max 8px radius (rounded-md).
components.sidebar: Fixed sidebar, solid bg-white or bg-gray-50, 1px right border, clear active states with accent_primary left border.

assets.icons: lucide-react for standard actions, @phosphor-icons/react for dense dashboard metrics.

login_background.description: Architectural corporate building interior, Swiss design style

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) design rules. No gradients, just flat bold colors. Focus on layout, typography, and clear data hierarchy.
Use Chivo for all headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text. Enforce tracking-tight on large headings.
For the login page, use the 'login_background' image behind a glassmorphism or stark white solid panel.
The Network Tree must be a custom built component. Use rectangular nodes with 1px borders, avatar images from the 'avatars' list, and connect them with absolute lines or CSS borders.
For the Product Catalog, utilize the 'product_placeholder' image for missing product images.
Implement data-testid attributes on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, menu items).
Dashboards should use 'Control Room' grid concepts with minimal empty space, fully utilizing horizontal real-estate.
Ensure contrast is APCA/WCAG compliant: Deep Charcoal text on Stark White or 10% Grey backgrounds.
All components must be compatible with Javascript (.js/.jsx) not Typescript (.tsx).
